name: Google Cloud for Startups
summary: Comprehensive cloud program offering massive credit tiers for AI-first companies and specialized support.
benefits: Up to $350,000 in Cloud credits for AI-first startups over two years
Up to $200,000 in Cloud credits for Seed to Series A startups
12 months of free Google Workspace Business Plus for new sign-ups
Access to AI Academy and specialized startup success managers
eligibility: Seed to Series A startups for high-tier credits
Must be new to Google Cloud for high-tier benefits
AI-first startups get preferential credit caps
